problem: What is the actual neurobiological mechanism of depression — serotonin alone is insufficient
mechanism: Cortical spreading depression mechanism in migraine
hypothesis: If Cortical spreading depression mechanism in migraine is applied to alone, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.

experiment.protocol: fMRI connectivity study with 8 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The important thing is not to stop questioning. — Einstein
